plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Zenki Dojo uses your location to automatically log your visits when you arrive at the dojo.

plugins.cameraPermission: Zenki Dojo uses your camera only to scan food barcodes for macro logging. Images are not stored or uploaded.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Zenki Dojo uses your location to automatically log your visits when you arrive at the dojo.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Zenki Dojo uses your camera only to scan food barcodes for macro logging. Images are not stored or uploaded.
